artifacts.title: Khoja Akhmet Yassawi International Kazakh-Turkish University staged source review
artifacts.summary: The accessible official AYU regulations index supports narrow staged claims that the university lists an academic integrity code, an academic policy, and an information security policy. No accessible official AI-specific policy was found during Firecrawl and HTTP discovery; several AI-related official-domain results were research or event material, and the linked policy PDFs under /admin/ were not fetched because robots.txt disallows that path.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.

The underlying academic integrity, academic policy, and information security PDF bodies were linked from /admin/ URLs that robots.txt disallows, so this staged bundle relies on the public regulations index rather than the PDF text.
No claim in this bundle states that AYU permits, prohibits, or requires generative AI tools.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
